creator: loise@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 172209
Qt Creator 4.0.3 update against svn HEAD diff

QtCreator was updated to 4.0.3 including the bugfix for FreeBSD to enable the run button again, see http://blog.qt.io/blog/2016/07/07/qt-creator-4-0-3-released/ for the announcement.

Attached is the svn diff against ports HEAD.
